Compliance.description: PPRA registered with FFC; Fidelity Fund; major SA franchise network; no major violations found.

Customer Satisfaction.description: HelloPeter 2.55/5 (110 reviews, 55% 1-star, NPS -37); mixed; some excellent agents balance poor overall.

Product Value.description: Full rental management services; standard industry pricing; nationwide franchise model provides reach.

Innovation.description: Digital listings, MyRawson portal for landlords; social media; no advanced tech or app found.

Customer Support.description: Per-branch support; mixed reviews; some outstanding individual agents; complaints on maintenance/delays.

Accessibility & Security.description: Website listings and portal; POPIA assumed; no app or advanced digital security found.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Management 8-10%+VAT/mo; commission standard 5-7.5%+VAT; let fee 100% monthly rent

socialSentiment.summary: HelloPeter negative; individual agents praised; franchise quality varies widely.
